Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user asks Consider an event log stored in a DuckDB table named event log with columns case id activity timestamp A process variant is defined as the ordered sequence of activities that occur in a single case determined by sorting events within that case by their timestamp

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: So they want a query that uses DuckDB probably using string agg to produce the ordered activity sequence per case Then group by variant to count cases rank top K then filter events

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus we can propose WITH case sequences AS SELECT case id list agg activity ORDER BY timestamp AS activity sequence FROM event log GROUP BY case id variant counts AS SELECT activity sequence count AS variant frequency row number OVER ORDER BY count DESC AS rank FROM case sequences GROUP BY activity sequence top k variants AS SELECT activity sequence FROM variant counts WHERE rank less than or equal to K SELECT e FROM event log e JOIN case sequences cs ON e case id equals cs case id JOIN top k variants tk ON cs activity sequence equals tk activity sequence ORDER BY e case id e timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: In DuckDB we can use LIST AGG ordered aggregate Or we can use string agg with ORDER BY

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If they want top K variants by frequency need to use limit K or row number Use K parameter

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Potential alternative Better approach WITH case sequences AS SELECT case id list agg activity ORDER BY timestamp AS activity seq FROM event log GROUP BY case id variant counts AS SELECT activity seq count AS cnt dense rank OVER ORDER BY count DESC AS rnk FROM case sequences GROUP BY activity seq top k AS SELECT activity seq FROM variant counts WHERE rnk less than or equal to K SELECT e FROM event log e JOIN case sequences cs ON e case id equals cs case id JOIN top k tk ON cs activity seq equals tk activity seq ORDER BY e case id e timestamp

Name: Validation - IND
Text: If they need to return also variant frequency include variant counts

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus final answer Provide explanation and the SQL query
